name: folium
description: Linked cards for thinking, with local-first Markdown storage

scripts.pack:desktop: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend && electron-builder --mac --dir && npm run pack:desktop:fix-native
scripts.pack:desktop:fix-native: npm run native:electron && mkdir -p /tmp/zk-electron-native && cp node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node /tmp/zk-electron-native/better_sqlite3.node && npm run native:node && mkdir -p "release/mac-arm64/Folium.app/Contents/Resources/app/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release" && cp /tmp/zk-electron-native/better_sqlite3.node "release/mac-arm64/Folium.app/Contents/Resources/app/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node"
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend && electron-builder --mac && npm run pack:desktop:fix-native
scripts.start:desktop: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run start --workspace=desktop
